name: BART Legacy API
description: The BART Legacy API provides access to Bay Area Rapid Transit information including real-time departure estimates, station information, schedule planning, and service advisories. The API supports both XML and JSON response formats. Note: BART recommends using GTFS and GTFS-RT feeds for more up-to-date, supported standards.
